  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
  2. Problem

Uses of Interface
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.Problem

Packages that use Problem
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
Primary framework abstractions for algorithms, models, populations and optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.defaults
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.plugins
Plugin metadata and dependency contracts.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.experiments.factory
Factories that assemble runtime components from config/plugins.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous
Probabilistic models for continuous search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete
Probabilistic models for discrete/binary search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.token
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation
Probabilistic models for permutation spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems
Problem implementations and shared problem-level helpers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.continuous
Continuous benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto
Boolean-function and cryptography optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete
Discrete benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.grammar
Grammar-based symbolic regression/classification problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.multiobjective
Multi-objective benchmark suites.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.permutation
Permutation benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.tree
Structured tree benchmark problems.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    G
    ConstraintHandling.enforce(G candidate, Representation<G> representation, Problem<G> problem, RngStream rng)
    Repairs or rejects-and-resamples candidate solutions.
    AlgorithmContext.Builder<G>
    AlgorithmContext.Builder.problem(Problem<G> problem)
     
    Individual<G>
    LocalSearch.refine(Individual<G> individual, Problem<G> problem, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Applies local search and returns the refined individual.
    List<G>
    Model.sample(int count, Representation<G> representation, Problem<G> problem, ConstraintHandling<G> constraintHandling, RngStream rng)
    Samples new genotypes from model.

  • Uses of Problem in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    CocoBbobProblem
    COCO/BBOB benchmark problem adapter.
    final class 
    MixedVariableToyProblem
    Mixed-variable toy benchmark to validate mixed representation plumbing.
    final class 
    OneMaxProblem
    OneMax benchmark: maximize number of ones in bitstring.
    final class 
    RastriginProblem
    Rastrigin benchmark.
    final class 
    RosenbrockProblem
    Rosenbrock benchmark.
    final class 
    SmallTspProblem
    Small TSP benchmark with configurable or default city coordinates.
    final class 
    SphereProblem
    Sphere benchmark: minimize sum(x_i^2).

  • Uses of Problem in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.continuous

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.continuous that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    Cec2014Problem
    CEC 2014-style continuous benchmark adapter.

  • Uses of Problem in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractBooleanFunctionProblem<G>
    Shared base for cryptographic boolean-function optimization problems.
    final class 
    BooleanFunctionMultiObjectiveProblem
    Multi-objective boolean-function problem emitting one objective per selected criterion.
    final class 
    BooleanFunctionPermutationProblem
    Balanced boolean-function optimization with permutation encoding.
    final class 
    BooleanFunctionProblem
    Boolean-function optimization over direct truth-table bitstring encoding.
    final class 
    BooleanFunctionTreeProblem
    Boolean-function optimization where genotype is interpreted as tokenized boolean expression tree.

  • Uses of Problem in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    KnapsackProblem
    0/1 knapsack benchmark with linear overweight penalty.
    final class 
    MaxSatProblem
    MAX-SAT benchmark over fixed CNF formula.

  • Uses of Problem in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    AlmostDisjunctMatrixProblem
    (t,epsilon)-disjunct matrix design objective using exact paper fitness: fit3(A) = fit1(A)/(C(N,t)*(N-t)).
    final class 
    DisjunctMatrixProblem
    t-disjunct matrix design objective using exact paper fitness: fit1(A) = sum_{S in S_t} delta(S).
    final class 
    ResolvableMatrixProblem
    (t,f)-resolvable matrix design objective using exact paper fitness: fit2(A) = |{S in S_t : delta(S) > f}|.

  • Uses of Problem in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.grammar

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.grammar that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractGrammarBitStringProblem
    Shared base for grammar-encoded symbolic optimization problems.
    final class 
    GrammarCsvClassificationProblem
    Symbolic classifier over CSV datasets (binary and multiclass).
    final class 
    GrammarCsvRegressionProblem
    Symbolic regression over CSV dataset.
    final class 
    GrammarMajorityProblem
    Majority-vote boolean symbolic classification benchmark.
    final class 
    GrammarNguyenRegressionProblem
    Nguyen symbolic regression benchmark using grammar-based expression representation.
    final class 
    GrammarXorProblem
    Boolean XOR symbolic classification benchmark.

    Description
